repository_role: HELIX umbrella architecture and coordination registry

resolution_rules.current_default_branch_head: Resolve from live GitHub metadata. Embedded commit SHAs are historical observations and must not be treated as the current head after later commits or merges.
resolution_rules.open_pull_requests: Resolve from live GitHub metadata. Do not maintain a supposedly canonical embedded open-PR list that becomes stale when this file is committed.
resolution_rules.temporary_write_authority: A temporary write claim is valid only for its named repository branch, declared paths, and open pull request. It expires automatically when that pull request closes or merges.
resolution_rules.current_ci_review_and_merge_gate: Resolve from live GitHub workflow, review, pull-request and approval metadata for the exact current head. Do not embed a current pass, pending or approval state as canonical project truth.
source_precedence: live GitHub repository, pull-request, review and CI metadata
ChatGPT project instructions and conversation memory
resolution_rules.completed_increment_history: Completed increments are historical evidence, not an exhaustive or current ledger. Resolve the latest merged pull request, current default-branch head, CI, reviews and merge state from live GitHub.
resolution_rules.workstream_entries: Workstream entries are bounded claim declarations, not proof that authority is currently active. A claim is active only while live GitHub shows an open pull request for the exact declared branch; it expires automatically when that pull request closes or merges and does not require a follow-up commit merely to mark expiry.

trusted_baseline.observation_semantics: Historical observation of HELIX30000 main immediately after PR #8 merged. Live GitHub determines the current head and latest completed increment after later commits or merges.

bootstrap_pull_request.title: Bootstrap HELIX persistence contracts v0.1
bootstrap_pull_request.governance_exception_semantics: Accepted absence of independent review does not mean independent review completed; merge authorization did not authorize deployment.

persistence.observation_semantics: Historical evidence captured from live GitHub. Re-resolve repository, branch, pull-request, CI, review and deployment state live before relying on it.

workstreams.authority_expiry_condition: Authority expired when the matching pull request merged.

workstreams.write_owner: HELIX — Coordination and Reality Control conversation
workstreams.objective: Reconcile HELIX30000 coordination records with the verified persistence repository, merged contract foundation, completed creation gate, and continuing prohibition on database, runtime, cloud and deployment work.
workstreams.status_resolution: Active only while live GitHub shows an open pull request for this exact branch. Resolve exact head, CI, reviews, issue disposition and merge state live.
workstreams.authority_expiry_condition: Temporary authority expires automatically when the matching pull request closes or merges.

capability_boundary.issue_supersession_via_pull_request: HELIX30000 issue #9 may close only when this reconciliation pull request merges

verification_criteria: the exact pull-request diff contains only .project/active-work.json
HELIX30000 main was f44870c7e870d249b94b8471d0eca0443d6c4be7 when the branch was created
the exact persistence repository identity is anthonyedgar30000/helix-data-evidence-persistence
persistence PR #1 is recorded as merged at 59cf801b5e28e82fcd3385713b505b549ae0addd from tested head a45b49e64494a3a15da67c989eeef0cbca494b7d
exact-head CI run 30057587710 is recorded as successful while merge-commit CI remains not observed
the accepted missing-independent-review exception remains distinct from independent review completion
Issue #9 is superseded by verified repository creation and merged bootstrap evidence and closes only on reconciliation merge
database, runtime, migration, cloud, credential, legacy-import, deployment and operational-verification claims remain false
JSON parses successfully and repository CI passes
workstreams.next_gate: Open one draft pull request, verify the exact one-file scope and exact-head CI, perform read-only review, and keep merge as a separate explicit human decision.

pull_request_state_resolution.pull_request_identifier_semantics: A pull-request number may be reported in review evidence but is not embedded as current canonical state. Resolve open, closed, merged, head, CI, review and approval state live.

next_bounded_candidate.safe_scope: After a new live synchronization, define one bounded persistence design or implementation increment with its own branch, permitted paths, verification criteria and pull request. The merged contract foundation alone does not authorize a database schema, migrations, runtime service, cloud resources or deployment.
prohibited_without_new_authorization: legacy HelixMemoryService code or data import

authority_boundary.helix30000_control_tower: Coordination-only outside an explicitly declared temporary workstream; stable role does not grant repository-write authority.
authority_boundary.persistence_workspace: Dedicated repository exists and its documentation-and-contract foundation is merged. This grants no database, runtime, deployment or cloud authority.
authority_boundary.persistence_repository: anthonyedgar30000/helix-data-evidence-persistence exists; current implementation authority is none because no live bounded persistence pull request is open.
authority_boundary.helix_memory_service: Read-only legacy prototype evidence; not canonical HELIX persistence and not imported.
authority_boundary.protocol_kernel: Read-only contract dependency; no external repository writes.
authority_boundary.contextos: Read-only boundary dependency; no external repository writes.
authority_boundary.service_tracer: Read-only evidence source; no external repository writes.

workstream_semantics.activation_rule: active only while live GitHub shows an open pull request whose head branch exactly matches the declared branch
workstream_semantics.expiry_rule: authority expires automatically when the matching pull request closes or merges
